description_long: This street light consists of two vertical wooden poles supporting a suspended string of six red lantern-style lamp heads. The lanterns are evenly spaced along a thin cable or wire, each featuring a rounded, slightly faceted shape with a metallic cap at the top. The poles are simple and cylindrical, with a natural wood texture and no visible ornamentation. The lanterns evoke a festive or decorative aesthetic, commonly seen in cultural festivals or urban parks. The overall structure is lightweight and appears designed for temporary or semi-permanent installation. The lamp heads are positioned to provide ambient lighting along the length of the string.
description: A string of six red lantern-style lamps suspended between two plain wooden poles, creating a festive and decorative street light.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six red lanterns evenly spaced between two upright wooden poles.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the poles and the lanterns aligned in a row, with minimal depth visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the lanterns and poles from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile of the poles and lanterns in a straight line.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Lantern-style, rounded red lamp heads with metallic caps, evoking a festive or traditional aesthetic, no visible diffusers.
